name: Commission Junction (Actions)
description: The Commission Junction Browser Destination allows you to install the CJ Javascript pixel onto your site and pass mapped Segment events and metadata to CJ.

actionTrackerId.label: Action Tracker ID
actionTrackerId.description: Used with the "Order" Action only. Can be overridden at the Action level. This is a static value provided by CJ. Each account may have multiple actions and each will be referenced by a different actionTrackerId value.

sitePage.title: Site Page
sitePage.description: Send site page data to CJ.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: A unique ID assigned by you to the user.

pageType.label: Page Type
pageType.description: Page type to be sent to CJ.

referringChannel.label: Referring Channel
referringChannel.description: The referring channel to be sent to CJ.

cartSubtotal.label: Cart Subtotal
cartSubtotal.description: The cart subtotal to be sent to CJ.

items.label: Items
items.description: The items to be sent to CJ.

unitPrice.label: Unit Price
unitPrice.description: the price of the item before tax and discount.

discount.label: Discount
discount.description: The discount applied to the item.

verticalType.label: Vertical type
verticalType.description: Send additional data relating to travel, finance network services

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: A unique ID assigned by you to the user.

pageType.label: Page Type
pageType.description: Page type to be sent to CJ. Must be set to "conversionConfirmation" for order events.

emailHash.label: Email address
emailHash.description: Segment will ensure the email address is hashed before sending to CJ.

orderId.label: Order ID
orderId.description: The orderId is a unique identifier, such as an order identifier or invoice number, which must be populated for each order.

actionTrackerId.label: Action Tracker ID
actionTrackerId.description: Required if not specified in Settings. This is a static value provided by CJ. Each account may have multiple actions and each will be referenced by a different actionTrackerId value.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: The currency of the order, e.g. USD, EUR.

amount.label: Amount
amount.description: The total amount of the order. This should exclude shipping or tax.

discount.label: Discount
discount.description: The total discount applied to the order.

coupon.label: Coupon
coupon.description: The coupon code applied to the order.

cjeventOrderCookieName.label: CJ Event Order Cookie Name
cjeventOrderCookieName.description: The name of the cookie that stores the CJ Event ID. This is required whenever the advertiser uses their own cookie to store the Event ID.

items.label: Items
items.description: The items to be sent to CJ.

unitPrice.label: Unit Price
unitPrice.description: the price of the item before tax and discount.

discount.label: Discount
discount.description: The discount applied to the item.

allVerticals.label: All Vertical Parameters
allVerticals.description: This field is used to pass additional parameters specific to the vertical. All vertical parameters listed below can be utilized regardless of the account's vertical.

ancillarySpend.label: Ancillary Spend
ancillarySpend.description: Ancillary spend at the time of transaction, but not commissionable.

brand.label: Brand
brand.description: Brand of items purchased. If there are multiple items with different brands, one brand must be designated for the order.

brandId.label: Brand ID
brandId.description: Identifier of brand of items purchased. If there are multiple items with different brands, one brand must be designated for the order.

businessUnit.label: Business Unit
businessUnit.description: Identifies the business unit the customer purchased through. If there are multiple items with different business units, one business unit must be designated for the order.

category.label: Category
category.description: Category of items purchased. If there are multiple items with different categories, one category must be designated for the order.

couponDiscount.label: Coupon Discount
couponDiscount.description: The value (amount of discount) of the coupon. This should be the number linked to the "coupon_type" parameter

couponType.label: Coupon Type
couponType.description: The type of coupon used in the order. This should be the number linked to the "coupon_discount" parameter.

customerCountry.label: Customer Country
customerCountry.description: The customer's country. ISO 3166-1 alpha 2 country code, eg. US, UK, AU, FR.

customerStatus.label: Customer Status
customerStatus.description: The status of the customer, e.g. new, returning.

customerType.label: Customer Type
customerType.description: Indicates the type of individual making the purchase as someone representing a group.

delivery.label: Delivery
delivery.description: The delivery method used for the order.

endDateTime.label: End Date Time
endDateTime.description: End date and time of the order, in ISO 8601 format.

genre.label: Genre
genre.description: Product genre. If there are multiple items with different genres, one genre must be designated for the order.

itemId.label: Item ID
itemId.description: Id for the item. (Simple Actions Only).

location.label: Location
location.description: Identifies the customer location if different from customerCountry.

loyaltyEarned.label: Loyalty Earned
loyaltyEarned.description: Loyalty points earned on the transaction.

loyaltyFirstTimeSignup.label: Loyalty First Time Signup
loyaltyFirstTimeSignup.description: Indicates whether this order coincided with the consumer joining the loyalty program.

loyaltyLevel.label: Loyalty Level
loyaltyLevel.description: Indicates the level of the customer's loyalty status.

loyaltyRedeemed.label: Loyalty Redeemed
loyaltyRedeemed.description: Loyalty points used during the transaction.

loyaltyStatus.label: Loyalty Status
loyaltyStatus.description: Indicates if the customer is a loyalty member.

margin.label: Margin
margin.description: Margin on total order. Can be a dollar value or a custom indicator.

marketingChannel.label: Marketing Channel
marketingChannel.description: Advertiser-defined marketing channel assigned to this transaction.

noCancellation.label: No Cancellation
noCancellation.description: Indicates if the purchase has a no cancellation policy. "Yes" means there is a "no cancellation" policy, "no" means there is no policy.

pointOfSale.label: Point of Sale
pointOfSale.description: Point of sale for the transaction.

preorder.label: Preorder
preorder.description: Indicates if the purchase was made prior to the item becoming available.

prepaid.label: Prepaid
prepaid.description: Indicates if the payment was made in advance of the item's consumption.

promotion.label: Promotion
promotion.description: Promotion applied. If multiple, must be comma-separated.

promotionAmount.label: Promotion Amount
promotionAmount.description: The numeric value associated with the promotion.

promotionConditionThreshold.label: Promotion Condition Threshold
promotionConditionThreshold.description: Threshold needed to qualify for the promotion.

promotionConditionType.label: Promotion Condition Type
promotionConditionType.description: Type of conditions applied to the promotion.

promotionEnds.label: Promotion Ends
promotionEnds.description: End date of the promotion, in ISO 8601 format.

promotionStarts.label: Promotion Starts
promotionStarts.description: Start date of the promotion, in ISO 8601 format.

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.description: Quantity for a given SKU. (Simple Actions Only).

startDateTime.label: Start Date Time
startDateTime.description: Start of item duration (e.g., check-out or departure date/time). Must be in ISO 8601 format.

subscriptionFee.label: Subscription Fee
subscriptionFee.description: Cost of subscription fee featured when signing up for free trial.

upsell.label: Upsell
upsell.description: Indicates if someone converted from a trial to a subscription.

travelVerticals.label: Travel Vertical Parameters
travelVerticals.description: This field is used to pass additional parameters specific to the travel vertical.

bookingStatus.label: Booking Status
bookingStatus.description: Booking status at the time of tag firing.

carOptions.label: Car Options
carOptions.description: Other items added to the reservation beyond the vehicle itself (e.g. "insurance", "GPS", "Car Seat").

class.label: Class
class.description: Class of item (flight, hotel, car, or cruise specific classes).

destinationCity.label: Destination City
destinationCity.description: Customer service destination city name (New York City, Boston, Atlanta, etc...). If destinationCity is provided, destinationState must also be provided. If there is no Origin/Destination combo, but needs to indicate a location of service (network service, event) use 'destination' set of parameters.

destinationCountry.label: Destination Country
destinationCountry.description: Customer service destination country code, per ISO 3166-1 alpha 3 country code (USA, GBR, SWE, etc...).

destinationState.label: Destination State
destinationState.description: Customer service destination state/province code. ISO 3166-2 country subdivision standards. e.g. US-NY, US-CA, US-FL, US-TX

domestic.label: Domestic Travel
domestic.description: Indicates whether the travel is domestic (Yes) or international (No).

dropoffIata.label: Dropoff IATA
dropoffIata.description: Destination location IATA code. 3 letter IATA code.

flightFareType.label: Flight Fare Type
flightFareType.description: Type of flight fare (e.g. gotta get away).

flightOptions.label: Flight Options
flightOptions.description: Other items added to the reservation (e.g. Wi-Fi).

flightType.label: Flight Type
flightType.description: Type of flight (e.g. direct, layover, overnight).

flyerMiles.label: Flyer Miles
flyerMiles.description: Flyer miles earned from this flight.

iata.label: IATA
iata.description: IATA code (3-letter); If using for a multi-stop flight each city in a flight can be provided in a comma-separated list.

minimumStayDuration.label: Minimum Stay Duration
minimumStayDuration.description: Minimum stay duration required in days.

originCity.label: Origin City
originCity.description: Customer service origin city name (New York City, Ottawa, Los Angeles, etc...). If originCity is provided, originState is also provided

originCountry.label: Origin Country
originCountry.description: Customer service origin country code per ISO 3166-1 alpha 3 country code (USA, GBR, SWE, etc...).

originState.label: Origin State
originState.description: Customer service origin state/province code per ISO 3166-2 country subdivision standards (Alaska would be "or_state=US-AK", Bangkok would be "or_state=TH-10").

paidAtBookingPostTax.label: Paid at Booking (Post-Tax)
paidAtBookingPostTax.description: Amount paid at booking after taxes.

paidAtBookingPreTax.label: Paid at Booking (Pre-Tax)
paidAtBookingPreTax.description: Amount paid at booking before taxes.

roomType.label: Room Type
roomType.description: Room type booked. If using the same values listed for "class" parameter, use that parameter instead.

travelType.label: Travel Type
travelType.description: Type of travel being booked. If you want access to standardized benchmark reporting, you must pass a value from the following list.

financeVerticals.label: Finance Verticals
financeVerticals.description: This field is used to pass additional parameters specific to the finance vertical.

applicationStatus.label: Application Status
applicationStatus.description: Identifies the status of the application at the time the transaction is sent to CJ.

apr.label: APR
apr.description: APR at time of application approval.

aprTransferTime.label: APR Transfer Time
aprTransferTime.description: If transfer APR is only for a certain period of time, pass the number of months here.

cashAdvanceFee.label: Cash Advance Fee
cashAdvanceFee.description: Amount of the fee associated with the cash advance.

creditReport.label: Credit Report
creditReport.description: Indicates if the customer received a credit report and if it was purchased.

creditLine.label: Credit Line
creditLine.description: Amount of credit extended through product.

creditQuality.label: Credit Quality
creditQuality.description: Minimum credit tier required for product approval. (300-579=Very Poor, 580-669=Fair, 670-739=Good,740-799=Very Good, 800-850=Exceptional).

fundedAmount.label: Funded Amount
fundedAmount.description: Indicates the amount of funding added to the account at the time of transaction.

fundedCurrency.label: Funded Currency
fundedCurrency.description: Currency of the funding provided for the new account.

introductoryApr.label: Introductory APR
introductoryApr.description: The introductory APR amount. (If the intro APR is not different than overall APR, use the "APR" parameter).

introductoryAprTime.label: Introductory APR Time
introductoryAprTime.description: The number of months the intro APR applies for.

minimumBalance.label: Minimum Balance
minimumBalance.description: Value of the minimum cash balance requirement for the account.

minimumDeposit.label: Minimum Deposit
minimumDeposit.description: Indicates the value if a minimum deposit is required.

prequalify.label: Prequalify
prequalify.description: Indicates if the applicant was pre-qualified for the card.

transferFee.label: Transfer Fee
transferFee.description: The transfer fee amount (i.e. for a credit card).

networkServicesVerticals.label: Network Services Verticals
networkServicesVerticals.description: This field is used to pass additional parameters specific to the network services vertical.

applicationStatus.label: Application Status
applicationStatus.description: Identifies the status of the application at the time the transaction is sent to CJ.
